nasb.text: But Amnon had a friend whose name was Jonadab, the son of Shimeah, David’s brother; and Jonadab was a very shrewd man.

esv.text: But Amnon had a friend, whose name was Jonadab, the son of Shimeah, David’s brother. And Jonadab was a very crafty man.

cnv.text: 暗嫩有一個朋友，名叫約拿達，是大衛的哥哥示米亞的兒子。約拿達是一個非常狡猾的人。

ccb.text: 暗嫩有一个朋友名叫约拿达，是大卫长兄示米亚的儿子，生性狡猾。
